description.short: Fix bugs, scan for security issues, and manage tickets from Teams.
description.full: Agent Smith is an AI-powered DevOps agent that fixes bugs, runs security scans, and manages tickets. Interact via natural language in Teams channels or direct messages.

commands.title: fix
commands.description: Fix a ticket — e.g. fix #42 in my-project

commands.title: list tickets
commands.description: List open tickets in a project

commands.title: scan
commands.description: Run a security scan on a project
